episode_text:
day=1; meal=bananas, brownies, and chocolate sauce; setting=Social with person in Front; time_of_day=morning;
preferences: microwave_time=2 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize front occlusion; robot_speed=slow; skewering_axis=parallel to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=yes; transfer_mode=inside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=not applicable; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=LED; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=button; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=LED; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=button; retract_between_bites=yes; bite_dipping_preference=less; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=1000 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food type observed so far THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to preserve the view toward the social partner in front.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF user has limited trunk control and cannot lean forward AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food type observed so far THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE outside-mouth transfer is poorly matched to the user's physical abilities.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is inside mouth transfer THEN not applicable BECAUSE the user cannot reliably lean forward, making inside-mouth transfer the physically compatible mode.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF user has limited mouth opening AND dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE button input is physically feasible for this user and avoids unreliable open-mouth signaling during social interaction.

IF user has limited mouth opening AND dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE button input is physically feasible and avoids mouth-based readiness detection that may be unreliable.

IF user has limited mouth opening AND dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE button input is physically feasible and more reliable than mouth-based signaling.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF feeding task AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food type observed so far THEN perception BECAUSE the user explicitly accepted the reliable low-effort completion method for bites.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF drinking task AND user cannot reliably perform head gestures AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE perception for drinking depends on head-nod gestures, which are not physically reliable for this user.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF mouth wiping task AND user cannot reliably perform head gestures AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE perception for wiping depends on head-nod gestures, which are not physically reliable for this user.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral THEN yes BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred reducing prolonged visual obstruction in a front-facing social setting.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce AND dining context is social with a person in front AND affective_state is neutral THEN less BECAUSE the user accepted some dipping while limiting messiness in a social context.
